# ConsentLedger

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/distributionhostlocalipcdocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to distribution host local IPC](../local-ipc.md)

`internal/hostintegration.ConsentLedger` and `ConsentRecord` model explicit user intent as append-only facts. The current allow/deny view is derived as `ConsentState`.

| Consent | Meaning | When absent |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `background-helper` | Helper/login item/startup task may run after app close | Helper autostart is blocked |
| `provider-execute:<provider>` | A provider CLI may be executed | Detection may happen, execution is blocked |
| `workspace-access:<workspace-id>` | A selected workspace root may be accessed | Task materialization is blocked |
| `telemetry-sync` | SaaS progress/result metadata sync is allowed | Local-only mode |
| `review-demo-mode` | Review/demo mode may run without provider installation | Only real provider status is shown |

1. `provider-execute` requires a provider subject and must not include a workspace id.
2. `workspace-access` requires a workspace id subject and must not include a provider.
3. `background-helper`, `telemetry-sync`, and `review-demo-mode` are global consents and must not include provider or workspace subjects.
4. `revoked` is a new fact, not deletion. Only the reduced current view becomes false.
